item.name: 0. Authentication
POST /login - Alice (Admin, id 1)

response.name: 202 Accepted - JWT token returned
401 Unauthorized - Wrong password
401 Unauthorized - Unknown email

item.name: POST /login - Bob (Manager, id 2 - team: David #4, Eve #5)
POST /login - Carol (Manager, id 3 - team: Frank #6)
POST /login - David (Employee, id 4 - manager: Bob #2)
POST /login - Eve (Employee, id 5 - manager: Bob #2)
1. Staff Actions
1a. View Status & Balance
GET /remaining/4 - David's leave balance (run before and after cancellations)

response.name: 200 OK - Balance BEFORE cancellations (20 days remaining)
200 OK - Balance AFTER cancellations (25 days, LR1 restored)
400 Bad Request - Non-numeric employee ID param (/remaining/abc)
403 Forbidden - Employee views another employee's balance (/remaining/5)
response.body: {"error":"You are not authorised to view leave balance for this employee"}

item.name: GET /status/4 - David's leave request history

response.name: 200 OK - David's leave requests (LR1 Approved, LR2 Pending after seed)
response.body: {"message":"Status of leave requests for employee_id 4","data":[{"id":2,"leave_type":"Sick","start_date":"2026-05-01","end_date":"2026-05-02","status":"Pending","reason":"Feeling unwell","manager_note":null},{"id":1,"leave_type":"Vacation","start_date":"2026-04-07","end_date":"2026-04-11","status":"Approved","reason":"Family holiday","manager_note":null}]}

response.name: 400 Bad Request - Non-numeric employee ID param (/status/abc)
403 Forbidden - Employee views another employee's status (/status/5)
response.body: {"error":"You are not authorised to view leave requests for this employee"}

item.name: 1b. Request Leave
POST /leave-requests - Create leave request (all valid and invalid scenarios)

response.name: 201 Created - Valid vacation request Sep 1-5 2027 (LR7)
400 Bad Request - Missing start_date and end_date
400 Bad Request - Invalid date format (DD-MM-YYYY instead of YYYY-MM-DD)
400 Bad Request - End date before start date
response.body: {"error":"End date of 2027-09-01 is before the start date of 2027-09-10"}

response.name: 400 Bad Request - Invalid leave type 'Holiday' (valid: Vacation, Sick, Personal)
response.body: {"error":"Invalid leave_type. Must be one of: Vacation, Sick, Personal"}

response.name: 400 Bad Request - Exceeds remaining balance (31 days, David has 20 remaining)
409 Conflict - Overlapping with LR1 (Apr 7-11 2026, still Approved at this point)
response.body: {"error":"Date range of request overlaps with existing request"}

item.name: 1c. Cancel Leave
DELETE /leave-requests - Cancel pending request LR2 (sick leave)

response.name: 200 OK - Pending request cancelled (no days restored)
403 Forbidden - Employee cancels another employee's request (leave_request_id: 6, belongs to Eve)
400 Bad Request - Missing leave_request_id
400 Bad Request - leave_request_id not found (999)

item.name: DELETE /leave-requests - Cancel APPROVED request LR1 (EVIDENCES days restored)

response.name: 200 OK - Approved request cancelled, 5 days restored to balance
response.body: {"message":"Leave request has been cancelled. 5 day(s) have been restored to your annual leave balance.","data":{"id":1,"employee_id":4,"leave_type":"Vacation","start_date":"2026-04-07","end_date":"2026-04-11","status":"Cancelled","reason":null,"manager_note":null,"days_restored":5,"new_days_remaining":25}}

item.name: 2. Manager Actions
2a. View Team Requests
GET /pending/manager/2 - Bob's pending team requests (date filter params disabled)

response.name: 200 OK - All pending requests for Bob's team (LR6 + LR7)
200 OK - Date filtered (from=2026-07-01&to=2026-07-31, only LR6)
400 Bad Request - Invalid from date format

item.name: GET /leave-requests - All team requests (leave_type and date filters disabled)

response.name: 200 OK - All leave requests for Bob's team
200 OK - Filtered by leave_type=Vacation

item.name: GET /remaining/4 - Bob views David's leave balance

response.name: 200 OK - David's balance (25 days remaining after LR1 cancelled)
403 Forbidden - Manager views balance of employee not on their team (/remaining/6 = Frank, Carol's team)
response.body: {"error":"You are not authorised to view leave balance for this employee"}

item.name: 2b. Approve / Reject
PATCH /approve - Bob approves Eve's LR6 (Vacation Jul 14-25 2026)

response.name: 200 OK - LR6 approved
response.body: {"message":"Leave request 6 for employee_id 5 has been approved","data":{"reason":"Approved - enjoy your break!"}}

response.name: 400 Bad Request - LR6 already Approved (not Pending anymore)
403 Forbidden - Bob tries to approve LR4 (Frank's request, Carol's team)
response.body: {"error":"You can only approve leave requests for your direct reports"}

response.name: 400 Bad Request - leave_request_id 999 not found

item.name: PATCH /reject - Bob rejects David's LR7 (Vacation Sep 1-5 2027)

response.name: 200 OK - LR7 rejected
response.body: {"message":"Leave request 7 for employee_id 4 has been rejected","data":{"reason":"Team at capacity during this period."}}

response.name: 400 Bad Request - LR7 already Rejected (not Pending anymore)

item.name: 3. Admin Actions
GET /leave-requests - All requests with optional filters (employee, manager, type, date)

response.name: 200 OK - All leave requests (no filter)
response.body: {"message":"All leave requests","data":[{"id":7,"employee_id":4,"leave_type":"Vacation","start_date":"2027-09-01","end_date":"2027-09-05","status":"Rejected","reason":null,"manager_note":"Team at capacity during this period."},{"id":6,"employee_id":5,"leave_type":"Vacation","start_date":"2026-07-14","end_date":"2026-07-25","status":"Approved","reason":"Summer holiday","manager_note":"Approved - enjoy your break!"},{"id":5,"employee_id":7,"leave_type":"Vacation","start_date":"2026-04-14","end_date":"2026-04-18","status":"Cancelled","reason":null,"manager_note":null},{"id":4,"employee_id":6,"leave_type":"Vacation","start_date":"2026-06-02","end_date":"2026-06-13","status":"Approved","reason":"Summer holiday","manager_note":null},{"id":3,"employee_id":5,"leave_type":"Personal","start_date":"2026-03-24","end_date":"2026-03-24","status":"Rejected","reason":"Personal appointment","manager_note":null},{"id":2,"employee_id":4,"leave_type":"Sick","start_date":"2026-05-01","end_date":"2026-05-02","status":"Cancelled","reason":null,"manager_note":null},{"id":1,"employee_id":4,"leave_type":"Vacation","start_date":"2026-04-07","end_date":"2026-04-11","status":"Cancelled","reason":null,"manager_note":null}]}

response.name: 200 OK - Filtered by employee_id=5 (Eve's requests only)
response.body: {"message":"Leave requests for employee_id 5","data":[{"id":6,"employee_id":5,"leave_type":"Vacation","start_date":"2026-07-14","end_date":"2026-07-25","status":"Approved","reason":"Summer holiday","manager_note":"Approved - enjoy your break!"},{"id":3,"employee_id":5,"leave_type":"Personal","start_date":"2026-03-24","end_date":"2026-03-24","status":"Rejected","reason":"Personal appointment","manager_note":null}]}

response.name: 200 OK - Filtered by manager_id=2 (Bob's whole team)
response.body: {"message":"Leave requests for manager_id 2's team","data":[{"id":7,"employee_id":4,"leave_type":"Vacation","start_date":"2027-09-01","end_date":"2027-09-05","status":"Rejected","reason":null,"manager_note":"Team at capacity during this period."},{"id":6,"employee_id":5,"leave_type":"Vacation","start_date":"2026-07-14","end_date":"2026-07-25","status":"Approved","reason":"Summer holiday","manager_note":"Approved - enjoy your break!"},{"id":3,"employee_id":5,"leave_type":"Personal","start_date":"2026-03-24","end_date":"2026-03-24","status":"Rejected","reason":"Personal appointment","manager_note":null},{"id":2,"employee_id":4,"leave_type":"Sick","start_date":"2026-05-01","end_date":"2026-05-02","status":"Cancelled","reason":null,"manager_note":null},{"id":1,"employee_id":4,"leave_type":"Vacation","start_date":"2026-04-07","end_date":"2026-04-11","status":"Cancelled","reason":null,"manager_note":null}]}

response.name: 200 OK - Filtered by leave_type=Vacation and from=2026-04-01 to=2027-03-31
400 Bad Request - Both employee_id and manager_id provided
response.body: {"error":"Provide either employee_id or manager_id, not both"}

item.name: POST /users - Add new staff member

response.name: 200 OK - Henry created (id 8)
403 Forbidden - Non-admin attempts to create a user (Employee JWT)

item.name: PATCH /users/8 - Amend staff member (department, manager, and allowance scenarios)

response.name: 200 OK - Department and manager amended (Henry moved to Finance, reports to Carol)
200 OK - Annual leave allowance amended to 30
404 Not Found - User id does not exist

item.name: DELETE /users/8 - Delete Henry (cleanup)
POST /leave-requests - Admin submits on behalf of David (Oct 1-3 2027) -> LR8

response.name: 201 Created - Admin submitted LR8 for David

item.name: PATCH /approve - Admin approves LR8 on behalf of manager

response.name: 200 OK - Admin approved LR8
response.body: {"message":"Leave request 8 for employee_id 4 has been approved","data":{"reason":"Approved by admin on behalf of manager."}}

item.name: 4. Additional Features
GET /reports/team-utilisation/2 - Bob's team utilisation (Manager or Admin)

response.name: 200 OK - Bob's team utilisation report
403 Forbidden - Bob tries to view Carol's team utilisation
response.body: {"error":"You can only view utilisation for your own team"}

item.name: GET /reports/team-utilisation/3 - Carol's team utilisation (Admin only)
GET /reports/status-breakdown - Status breakdown (company-wide or by department)

response.name: 200 OK - Company-wide breakdown
200 OK - Engineering department only (department_id=1)

item.name: POST /leave-requests - EXTENSION: Sick leave type (Admin for Frank)
